dialogos.texto_en: Parasailing was so fun!\nWhat a valuable experience that was!
Flying in the sky felt truly amazing!
Yeah, it was like taking a walk in the sky.
I could clearly see the boat drawing white waves\non the blue sea surface...
It was like watching a scene from a movie.
I know, right!\nIt made me feel like I was the protagonist!
Futaro-kun, you did it twice, but how was it?\nDid you notice any differences the second time?
Well, since I was less nervous,\nI could enjoy the view more. It would be even more fun\nif we studied the terrain beforehand.
I just don't understand why only Uesugi-kun\ngot to ride twice. That's so unfair.
I mean, it couldn't be helped due to the number of people.\nWe couldn't just let Raiha ride alone.
Well, I wanted to ride with Raiha-chan too.
Itsuki-chan, it seems like\nyou really enjoyed parasailing, huh.
You were so freaked out and fidgety\nbefore we took off, though.
I wasn't fidgety!\nI was just a little nervous.
Is that so?\nYour voice was shaking a lot before we flew, you know?
Ugh, Nino!
Hey, Yotsuba.\nWhat should we do next?
Good question.\nHmm...
We just finished parasailing,\nso maybe we should take a break for now.
Sounds good.\nI'm thirsty, so I'll go buy something to drink.
Are there any beachside shops or cafes around here?
I saw a shop over there.\nIf you're looking for a light meal,\nthey might have something.
Alright, it's free time now.\nLet's meet back here when it's time to go.
Alrighty.
It seems like everyone had fun parasailing.\nAwesome, right?
Yeah.\nI'm relieved that everyone enjoyed it.
We have some free time now...\nShould we go check out some other places?
Oh, sorry. I was actually planning to ask everyone\nwhat they want to do next.
I see...
(Well, if that's Yotsuba's plan,\n then count me in.)
Hey, I'll help out too.
No no, you take a break, Uesugi-san.\nIt's free time, isn't it?
That's right, it's free time for everyone. \nAnd what I want to do during my free time\nis help you, Yotsuba.
Well, that's not fair.\nWhen you say it like that,\nthere's no way I can refuse.
After we're done,\nlet's meet up and take a break together.
Okay, got it.
